title: ERRO[2454] Failed to cleanup overlay mounts
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Install Fedora 33

2. Create source directory for overlay mount

3. Run container using overlay mount

4. Terminate container and observe error message

**Describe the results you received:**

```
[user@localhost ~]$ rm -rf ~/.local/share/containers/
[user@localhost ~]$ rm -rf ~/.local/share/yum/
[user@localhost ~]$ install -d -m 755 ~/.local/share/yum
[user@localhost ~]$ time podman run -v ~/.local/share/yum:/var/cache/dnf:z --rm fedora:33 yum makecache
Trying to pull registry.fedoraproject.org/fedora:33...
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob 8fde7942e775 done
Copying config 79fd58dc76 done
Writing manifest to image destination
Storing signatures
Fedora 33 openh264 (From Cisco) - x86_64        3.2 kB/s | 2.5 kB     00:00
Fedora Modular 33 - x86_64                      1.0 MB/s | 3.3 MB     00:03
Fedora Modular 33 - x86_64 - Updates            896 kB/s | 918 kB     00:01
Fedora 33 - x86_64 - Updates                    4.4 MB/s |  10 MB     00:02
Fedora 33 - x86_64                              3.3 MB/s |  72 MB     00:21

user    0m11.338s
sys     0m4.103s
[user@localhost ~]$ time podman run -v ~/.local/share/yum:/var/cache/dnf:O --rm fedora:33 echo test
test
ERRO[0000] Failed to cleanup overlay mounts for 0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2: failed to cleanup overlay /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay directory: unlinkat /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay/485125055/merge/updates-0e22a1f5a0a34771/repodata: directory not empty
ERRO[0000] cleanup storage: error removing container 0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2 root filesystem: 2 errors occurred:
        * unlinkat /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay/485125055/merge/updates-0e22a1f5a0a34771/repodata: directory not empty
        * unlinkat /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay/485125055/merge/updates-0e22a1f5a0a34771/repodata: directory not empty

ERRO[0000] Error removing container 0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2: error cleaning up container 0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2: error unmounting container 0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2 storage: failed to cleanup overlay /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay directory: unlinkat /home/user/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay-containers/0894839b91233e719e017b8f432775e911c07e17f5cea0a68a78115b94ab8ab2/userdata/overlay/485125055/merge/updates-0e22a1f5a0a34771/repodata: directory not empty

real    0m1.030s
user    0m0.274s
sys     0m0.417s
[user@localhost ~]$
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Clean Exit

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
(paste your output here)
[user@localhost ~]$ podman version

Go Version:   go1.15.2
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
(paste your output here)
[user@localhost ~]$ rpm -q podman
podman-2.1.1-12.fc33.x86_64

```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide?**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Physical host, or Hyper-V VM same effect. Fedora 32 or 33, same effect.

comments.body: podman 2.1.1 looks like it was using the overlay package from buildah 1.16.1, which didn't have an equivalent for https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/2725 in it yet.  This should be fixed in a version of podman that uses buildah 1.17 or the not-yet-tagged 1.16.6.

It's fixed in the master branch and will be released with Podman v2.2.

Thanks for opening the issue, @jamescassell !
